all.en: Subject: FY2026 Q1 Budget Increase Request — Marketing Department
all.zh: 主旨：2026 財年 Q1 預算追加申請 — 行銷部

all.en: Dear Ms. Tanaka,
all.zh: Tanaka 女士您好，

all.en: I hope this message finds you well during the busy quarter close.
all.zh: 希望這封信在繁忙的季末期間找到您一切安好。

all.en: I am writing to formally request an additional budget allocation for our department.
all.zh: 我寫信是為了正式申請追加部門預算。

all.en: The requested amount totals 180,000 US dollars for the upcoming quarter.
all.zh: 本次申請金額為下一季合計十八萬美元。

all.en: This request is driven by three time-sensitive market opportunities identified last month.
all.zh: 此申請源自上月發現的三項具時效性的市場機會。

all.en: First, we propose to launch a regional campaign across Southeast Asia.
all.zh: 首先，我們計畫在東南亞推出區域性行銷活動。

all.en: The estimated cost for this campaign is 95,000 dollars including media buying.
all.zh: 此活動預估成本為九萬五千美元，含媒體採購費用。

all.en: Second, we plan to attend the Tokyo Trade Expo as a platinum sponsor.
all.zh: 其次，我們計畫以白金級贊助商身分參加東京貿易展。

all.en: Sponsorship and booth construction will require approximately 55,000 dollars.
all.zh: 贊助費與展位搭建費用約需五萬五千美元。

all.en: Third, we intend to upgrade our customer analytics platform.
all.zh: 第三，我們打算升級客戶分析平台。

all.en: The annual license fee for the new platform is 30,000 dollars.
all.zh: 新平台的年度授權費為三萬美元。

all.en: A detailed line-item breakdown is attached as Appendix A to this email.
all.zh: 詳細的逐項成本明細已附於本郵件之附錄 A。

all.en: Our projected return on investment is 2.4 times the requested amount.
all.zh: 我們預估的投資報酬率為申請金額的 2.4 倍。

all.en: This figure is based on conversion data from comparable campaigns in FY2025.
all.zh: 此數字依據 2025 財年類似活動的轉換資料計算。

all.en: Specifically, the Southeast Asia campaign is expected to generate 1.5 million in revenue.
all.zh: 具體而言，東南亞活動預期可創造一百五十萬美元營收。

all.en: The Tokyo Expo historically yields 40 qualified enterprise leads per event.
all.zh: 東京展會過往平均每場可帶來四十個企業合格名單。

all.en: The analytics platform will reduce manual reporting hours by an estimated 35 percent.
all.zh: 分析平台預估可減少 35% 的人工報表工時。

all.en: I have discussed these initiatives with the Sales VP, who fully supports the proposal.
all.zh: 我已與業務副總討論這些方案，他全力支持本提案。

all.en: Without this additional funding, two of the three initiatives must be postponed.
all.zh: 若無此追加經費，三項方案中將有兩項必須延期。

all.en: Delaying the Southeast Asia campaign would cede market share to competitor B.
all.zh: 延後東南亞活動將使市佔率讓給競爭對手 B。

all.en: Missing the Tokyo Expo window means waiting another twelve months for re-entry.
all.zh: 錯過東京展會檔期意味著要再等十二個月才能重新參與。

all.en: We have also explored cost-saving measures within the existing budget envelope.
all.zh: 我們也已在現有預算範圍內探討撙節措施。

all.en: Travel expenses have been reduced by 18 percent through preferred vendor agreements.
all.zh: 差旅費用已透過優惠廠商合約降低 18%。

all.en: Print collateral spending was cut by 22 percent in favor of digital alternatives.
all.zh: 印刷品支出已削減 22%，改以數位替代方案因應。

all.en: However, these internal savings cannot cover the scale of the new opportunities.
all.zh: 然而，這些內部節流無法支應新機會的規模需求。

all.en: We respectfully request your review and approval by November 15th.
all.zh: 敬請您於 11 月 15 日前審閱並核准本案。

all.en: This deadline is critical to lock in early-bird sponsorship rates for the expo.
all.zh: 此期限對於鎖定展會早鳥贊助方案至關重要。

all.en: I would be happy to walk you through the financial model in person.
all.zh: 我很樂意當面為您逐項說明財務模型。

all.en: Please let me know a convenient thirty-minute slot next week.
all.zh: 請告知您下週方便的三十分鐘時段。

all.en: My team has also prepared a contingency plan should partial approval be granted.
all.zh: 我團隊也已備妥部分核准情況下的應變方案。

all.en: Under partial approval, we would prioritize the Southeast Asia campaign first.
all.zh: 若僅獲部分核准，我們將優先執行東南亞活動。

all.en: All vendor quotations referenced are valid through December 31st.
all.zh: 所引用的廠商報價皆於 12 月 31 日前有效。

all.en: Risk mitigation measures have been incorporated into each line item.
all.zh: 風險緩解措施已納入每項預算項目。

all.en: For instance, media spend includes a 10 percent reserve for underperformance.
all.zh: 舉例而言，媒體支出含 10% 績效不彰之保留款。

all.en: Quarterly performance reviews will be submitted to your office automatically.
all.zh: 季度績效檢討將自動提交至您的辦公室。

all.en: Any unused funds at quarter end will be returned to the corporate reserve.
all.zh: 季末任何未動用款項將歸還至公司準備金。

all.en: I understand the financial pressures the company faces this fiscal year.
all.zh: 我理解公司本財年所面臨的財務壓力。

all.en: Nevertheless, I believe this investment is essential for sustained growth.
all.zh: 儘管如此，我認為此項投資對持續成長至關重要。

all.en: Our competitors have already announced similar regional expansion plans.
all.zh: 競爭對手已宣布類似的區域擴張計畫。

all.en: Inaction at this point carries a quantifiable opportunity cost.
all.zh: 此時不採取行動將帶來可量化的機會成本。

all.en: We estimate the cost of inaction at approximately 600,000 dollars in lost pipeline.
all.zh: 我們估計不作為的代價約為六十萬美元的流失商機。

all.en: Attached please find the full proposal deck, financial model, and vendor quotations.
all.zh: 隨信附上完整提案簡報、財務模型與廠商報價。

all.en: Appendix B contains historical ROI data for comparable initiatives.
all.zh: 附錄 B 收錄類似方案的歷史投報資料。

all.en: Appendix C details the risk assessment matrix prepared by our analyst.
all.zh: 附錄 C 詳列我方分析師所製作的風險評估矩陣。

all.en: Should you require additional supporting materials, please let me know.
all.zh: 若您需要任何補充佐證資料，請隨時告知。

all.en: I can also arrange a joint briefing with our regional sales heads.
all.zh: 我也可協調與各區業務主管的聯合簡報會。

all.en: Thank you in advance for your time and thoughtful consideration.
all.zh: 預先感謝您的撥冗審閱與審慎考量。

all.en: I remain committed to delivering measurable value from every approved dollar.
all.zh: 我承諾將從每一筆核准款項中創造可衡量的價值。

all.en: Please do not hesitate to contact me with any questions or concerns.
all.zh: 如有任何疑問或顧慮，請不吝與我聯繫。

all.en: I am available at extension 4421 or via mobile after business hours.
all.zh: 您可撥分機 4421 聯繫我，下班後亦可撥手機。

all.en: I look forward to your favorable response at your earliest convenience.
all.zh: 期待您能儘早回覆並予以支持。

all.en: Best regards,
all.zh: 謹致問候，

all.en: Daniel Park, Senior Director, Marketing Department
all.zh: Daniel Park，行銷部資深總監

all.en: Globex Corporation — Tokyo Office
all.zh: Globex 集團 — 東京辦公室
